properties.name: Increase capacity for generation in the Molong to Parkes area (94T)
properties.description: To increase capacity in the network west of Molong Substation which has a large number of renewable generators in service. The outputs of these generators are being curtailed, due to the existing thermal rating of line 94T. The RIT-T preferred option is to reconductor line 94T with higher rating low sag conductor. Separate to the 94T dynamic line rating project.
properties.capacity_note: 30-50 MVA increase in line capacity

properties.name: Project EnergyConnect - Stage 2
properties.description:
Stage 2:
-  Second 330 kV circuit closed on the Bundey–Buronga 330 kV double-circuit line (including 1 x 60 MVAr line reactor at Bundey and 1 x 50 MVAr line reactor at Buronga of each circuit).
- A new 330 kV double-circuit line from Dinawan to Buronga (including 60 MVAr line reactors at both ends of each circuit).
- A new 500 kV double-circuit line from Dinawan to Wagga Wagga operating at 330 kV (including 50 MVAr line reactors at the Dinawan end on each circuit).
- A new 330 kV switching station at Dinawan.
- Additional 4x200 MVA 330 kV phase shifting transformers at Buronga.
- Additional 2x
properties.capacity_note:
650 MW increase of flow between NSW and SA in both directions.

Inclusive of PEC stage 1 and 2:
- NSW to SA and VIC to SA (Heywood interconnector) combined transfer 1,300 MW.
- SA to NSW and SA to VIC

properties.name: Ararat synchronous condenser
properties.description:
The Ararat synchronous condenser consists of: 
- Installing a new 250 MVA synchronous condenser to the existing Ararat Terminal Station.
properties.capacity_note: This project will improve system strength in the network.

properties.name: Murray River REZ and Western Victoria REZ minor augmentations
properties.description:
The three Murray River and Western Victoria REZ minor augmentations include: 
- Establishing an automatic generator runback control scheme to manage thermal loading on the Red Cliffs – Kiamal – Murra Warra – Horsham – Bulgana 220 kV lines.
- Modifying the existing Murraylink Very Fast Runback (VFRB) control scheme to also operate for Murraylink import from South Australia to Victoria to manage thermal loading on the Red Cliffs – Kiamal – Murra Warra – Horsham – Bulgana 220 kV lines. 
- Undertaking terminal station interplant asset replacements at Ballarat, Ararat, Waubra, Bulgana and Kiamal te

properties.name: Victoria Central North REZ minor augmentations
properties.description:
The two Central North REZ minor augmentations include: 
- Establishing an automatic generator runback control scheme to manage thermal loading on the Dederang – Glenrowan – Shepparton – Bendigo 220 kV lines. 
- Installing a control scheme that automates the enablement of the additional cooling on the Dederang No.3 330/220 kV transformer, thereby allowing the 340 MVA short term rating to be used at all times, effectively increasing the transformer rating from 240 MVA to 340 MVA.
properties.capacity_note: 12 MW.

properties.name: HumeLink
properties.description:
- New Gugaa 500/330 kV Substation and 330 kV connection to the existing Wagga Wagga Substation
- Three 500 kV transmission circuits and shunt reactors:
    - Between Maragle and Bannaby 500 kV Substation, 120 MVAr shunt reactor at both ends, 
    - Between Maragle and Gugaa 500 kV Substation, 100 MVAr shunt reactor at Maragle end and
    - Between Gugaa and Bannaby 500 kV Substation, 120 MVAr shunt reactors at both ends.
      These circuits will be built on double-circuit transmission structures.
- Three new 500/330/33 kV 1,500 MVA transformers at Maragle Substation and two new 500/330/33 kV
properties.capacity_note: SNSW to CNSW: 2,200 MW in both directions.

properties.name: Western Renewables Link (WRL)
properties.description:
The WRL consists of: 
- A new 500 kV double-circuit transmission line from Sydenham Terminal Station to Bulgana Terminal Station with switched shunt line reactors at the end of each circuit (approximately 70 MVAr).
- Extension of the 500 kV Sydenham Terminal Station by two breaker and a half switched bays
- Additional 100 MVAr at 500 kV switched bus reactor at Sydenham Terminal Station.
- Rerouting of the existing No. 1 Sydenham to South Morang and Sydenham to Keilor 500 kV transmission lines to terminate into new bays at Sydenham Terminal Station.
- Construction of new 220 kV circuit breakers
properties.capacity_note:
WNV-MEL: 695 MW (both directions)
REZ:
V2: 310 MW
V3+V4: 1,150 MW

properties.name: Hunter-Central Coast REZ Network Infrastructure project.
properties.description:
EnergyCo has appointed Ausgrid as the Network operator (Commitment Deed executed December 2024) to deliver the HCC REZ 1 GW network transfer capacity. The scope comprises of electricity distribution network upgrades between Kurri substation and Muswellbrook bulk supply point in three portions. 

Portion 1: Upper Hunter Secondary Systems Modernisation (350 MW)
-Upgrade secondary systems in the Upper Hunter to enable bidirectional power flow. This includes remote end secondary systems works that will upgrade protection to duplicate differential line schemes on existing 132 kV lines between Muswe
properties.capacity_note:
This project will improve transfer capacity as follows:
- 400 MW through Muswellbrook BSP.
- 600 MW through Newcastle BSP.

properties.description:

- New 330 kV Elong Elong switching stations.

- 2 x 500 kV double-circuit lines and initially operated at 330 kV from Merotherie to Elong Elong with Quad Orange conductor.
- 3 x 250 MVAr synchronous condensers at Elong Elong switching station.
- 4 x 250 MVAr synchronous condensers at Merotherie substation.
- Provision of switch bays for future generator connections (cost

properties.name: Western Victoria Reinforcement Program
properties.description:
- Cut-in both existing Geelong to Keilor 220 kV lines into Deer Park.
- Replace existing Keilor 500/220kV transformers with 1,000 MVA units (expected to be completed as part of asset replacement project).

- Install minor interplant replacements to increase rating on both existing Geelong to Moorabool 220 kV lines.

properties.name: CQ-SQ Expansion

- Establish 500 kV substations Gladstone West (with 3x500/275 kV 1,500 MVA transformers) and Auburn River (with 2x500/275 kV 1,500 MVA transformers).
